sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Ki Blast System
special_mechanics.description: Characters can execute Ki blasts as attacks; health decreases when executing special moves while Ki recharges

special_mechanics.name: Rush Battle System
special_mechanics.description: Ki blast counterattacks triggered when both fighters strike simultaneously

special_mechanics.name: Stage Knockback
special_mechanics.description: Ability to send opponent character to the back of the stage

special_mechanics.name: Desperation Moves
special_mechanics.description: Special moves available when character health is critically low

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source contains gameplay mechanics description but no quantitative physics parameters (velocities, accelerations, gravity values, frame data, or sub-pixel precision details). Game is a 1v1 fighting game using 4-button control scheme with special move combinations. No movement-focused platforming mechanics documented.
